steps.t: Odo Pipes is hiding somewhere in Michel Delving. Rollo Newbuck has sent you to find Odo Pipes, rumoured to be the best Hider in the Shire. Odo is hidi…
Rollo Newbuck is east of The Bird and Baby Inn, within the stone wall around Town Hole. Rollo is waiting to hear that you have found Odo Pipes and his…
